de.uka.ilkd.key.rule

Interface Rule

  • All Known Subinterfaces:
    BuiltInRule
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractSideProofRule, AntecTaclet, BlockContractRule, CloseAfterJoin, FindTaclet, InfFlowContractAppTaclet, JoinRule, ModalitySideProofRule, NoFindTaclet, OneStepSimplifier, QueryExpand, QuerySideProofRule, RewriteTaclet, RuleAppSMT.SMTRule, SuccTaclet, Taclet, UseDependencyContractRule, UseOperationContractRule, WhileInvariantRule

    public interface Rule

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal, Services services, RuleApp ruleApp)
      the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.
      String displayName()
      returns the display name of the rule
      Name name()
      the name of the rule

    • Method Detail

      • apply

        ImmutableList<Goal> apply(Goal goal,
                          Services services,
                          RuleApp ruleApp)
                   throws RuleAbortException
        the rule is applied on the given goal using the information of rule application.
        Parameters:
        goal - the Goal on which to apply ruleApp
        services - the Services with the necessary information about the java programs
        ruleApp - the rule application to be executed
        Returns:
        all open goals below \old(goal.node()), i.e. the goals resulting from the rule application
        Throws:
        Exception
        RuleAbortException

      • name

        Name name()
        the name of the rule

      • displayName

        String displayName()
        returns the display name of the rule
